headline: MCHP Gains 56% in 3 Months: Is It Still a Red-Hot Stock to Bet on?
summary: MCHP's 56.5% three-month rally is backed by AI data-center demand, stronger bookings and upbeat June-quarter guidance, with analysts seeing more upside.
